detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Gon.openTrading() (Gon.sol#457-475):
	External calls:
	- _pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_router.WETH()) (Gon.sol#463)
	- _router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Gon.sol#465)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Gon.sol#465)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (Gon.sol#471)
	Gon.tradingOpen (Gon.sol#237) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Gon.openTrading() (Gon.sol#457-475)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Gon.openTrading()](Gon.sol#L457-L475):
	External calls:
	- [_pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_router.WETH())](Gon.sol#L463)
	- [_router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](Gon.sol#L465)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [_router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](Gon.sol#L465)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tradingOpen = true](Gon.sol#L471)
	[Gon.tradingOpen](Gon.sol#L237) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Gon.openTrading()](Gon.sol#L457-L475)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Gon._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Gon.sol#393-427):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(balanceOf(address(this))) (Gon.sol#409)
		- _router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Gon.sol#441)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Gon.sol#415)
		- _taxWallet.transfer(amount) (Gon.sol#449)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Gon.sol#425)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Gon.sol#523)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Gon.sol#503)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Gon.sol#505)
	Gon._rOwned (Gon.sol#203) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Gon._takeTeam(uint256) (Gon.sol#517-525)
	- Gon._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Gon.sol#499-513)
	- Gon.balanceOf(address) (Gon.sol#309-313)
	- Gon.constructor() (Gon.sol#259-273)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Gon.sol#425)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Gon.sol#531)
	Gon._rTotal (Gon.sol#213) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Gon._getCurrentSupply() (Gon.sol#627-637)
	- Gon._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Gon.sol#529-535)
	- Gon.constructor() (Gon.sol#259-273)
	- Gon.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Gon.sol#357-365)

		- [_taxWallet.transfer(amount)](Gon.sol#L449)

		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](Gon.sol#L505)
	[Gon._rOwned](Gon.sol#L203) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Gon._takeTeam(uint256)](Gon.sol#L517-L525)

	- [Gon.balanceOf(address)](Gon.sol#L309-L313)

	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount)](Gon.sol#L425)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Gon.sol#L531)
	[Gon._rTotal](Gon.sol#L213) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Gon._getCurrentSupply()](Gon.sol#L627-L637)
	- [Gon._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](Gon.sol#L529-L535)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.4 (Gon.sol#5)
